text.#hero-title: Secure your solar, storage and energy performance decisions in Morocco
text..hero-copy > p:not(.hero-badge): Atlas Energie Conseil supports industrial companies, tertiary sites, developers and investors with profitability analysis, technical structuring and secure energy decision-making.
text.#situations .section-heading p:not(.eyeb: We intervene when an energy decision must be clarified before committing budgets, partners or a deployment timeline.
text.#situations .section-cta p: Do you have an energy decision to secure?
text.#systemes .section-heading p:not(.eyebro: Every site has a different consumption profile, risk level and investment logic. Atlas Energie Conseil helps you compare scenarios before committing to a technical or financial solution.
text.#systemes .section-cta p: Are you hesitating between several scenarios?
text.#pre-diagnostic-title: Clarify your need in a few questions
text.#pre-diagnostic .diagnostic-copy > p:not: Answer a few simple questions to identify the scenario worth exploring. This pre-diagnostic does not replace a technical study: it prepares a structured and independent first discussion.
text..diagnostic-assurance p: No personal data is requested, no answer is stored and no result constitutes a technical or financial guarantee.
text..diagnostic-result-note: This orientation is indicative. It is not a complete technical or financial study. A discussion helps verify assumptions and frame the next steps.
text.#services-title: Technical and strategic advisory for your energy projects
text.#apropos-title: An independent approach to structure the right energy decisions.
text.#secteurs-title: Environments where energy becomes a competitiveness lever.
text.#avantages-title: A clear method to turn energy into a controlled decision.
text.#faq .section-heading p:not(.eyebrow): Before committing to a solar, storage or hybrid project, some questions must be clarified. These answers help you understand the stakes before a first discussion.
text.#checklist .checklist-copy > p:not(.eyeb: A concise checklist to identify the points to clarify before comparing solar, storage or hybrid offers in Morocco. It does not replace a technical study, but helps prepare a more structured decision.
text.#checklist .checklist-note: Available by WhatsApp or email after a first message. No complex form for now.
text.#checklist .checklist-preview h3: What the checklist helps you clarify
text.#contact-title: Clarify your energy decision with a confidential first exchange.
text.#contact .contact-copy > p:not(.eyebrow): A confidential exchange to qualify your need, clarify priorities and define concrete next steps.
text..contact-note p: A direct, confidential and decision-oriented framework to understand your context, constraints and the trade-offs to secure.
text..footer-brand p: Independent advisory in solar energy, storage and energy performance in Morocco.

analysis.title: Energy analysis recommended
analysis.text: Your project would benefit from being framed by an independent energy analysis before comparing technical solutions.

pv.title: PV without battery to study
pv.text: A photovoltaic scenario without battery could be a first option to study, especially if your consumption is naturally aligned with solar production.

battery.title: PV + battery scenario to compare
battery.text: A PV + battery scenario deserves comparison, provided the real uses of storage, its sizing and its economic consistency are verified.

backup.title: Resilience / backup to analyze
backup.text: Your priority appears linked to business continuity. An energy resilience and backup analysis is recommended before any decision.

exchange.title: First exchange recommended
exchange.text: A first exchange will help clarify assumptions, compare scenarios and prepare a more secure decision.

items.question: When does a solar project become relevant for a company in Morocco?
items.answer: A solar project becomes relevant when the consumption profile, electricity costs, available surfaces and site constraints make coherent self-consumption possible. The analysis must verify profitability as well as technical and operational limits.

items.question: Is a battery always necessary with a photovoltaic installation?
items.answer: No. A battery is relevant only if it addresses a clear use: shifting energy, reducing certain peaks, improving flexibility or strengthening resilience. It must be sized according to the real needs of the site, not added automatically.

items.question: What is the difference between solar self-consumption and battery storage?
items.answer: Self-consumption means directly using the solar electricity produced on site. Storage keeps part of this energy for another moment or a specific use. The two approaches can complement each other, but they do not address the same need.

items.question: Why carry out an energy analysis before requesting quotes?
items.answer: An independent analysis helps clarify objectives, compare scenarios and avoid basing the decision only on a commercial offer. It frames the project before committing budgets, partners or a deployment schedule.

items.question: How can the power supply of a sensitive or industrial site be secured?
items.answer: Security depends on priority loads, sensitivity to outages, the grid, the possible role of a battery and a generator. A structured approach compares backup and resilience scenarios before decision.

items.question: Does Atlas Energie Conseil install solar or battery equipment?
items.answer: Atlas Energie Conseil acts as an independent advisor. The goal is to analyze, compare, structure and secure energy decisions. The support is not based on selling or supplying equipment.

items.question: Who is Atlas Energie Conseil’s support for?
items.answer: The support is intended for industrial companies, tertiary sites, logistics players, infrastructure, developers, investors and project owners who want to clarify a solar, storage or energy performance decision in Morocco.

items.question: What happens during the first exchange?
items.answer: The first exchange is used to understand the site context, objectives, constraints, project maturity and decisions to secure. It identifies useful next steps without immediately committing to a full study.

items.question: What elements are useful to analyze an energy site?
items.answer: Useful elements may include electricity bills, consumption profiles, site constraints, available surfaces, continuity objectives, offers already received and investment priorities. Available information guides the level of analysis needed.

items.question: Does the pre-diagnostic replace a technical study?
items.answer: No. The pre-diagnostic provides an indicative first orientation. It does not replace a complete technical, economic or financial study. It prepares a more structured exchange and identifies the scenario to explore.

schema.professionalDescription: Independent advisory in solar energy, storage, energy performance and project structuring in Morocco.
